text: Default mode is stochastic everywhere (byte-identical to pre-plan); operators opt in via --argmax-eval.
Deterministic stake is Beta.mean not Beta.mode: mean is simpler, always defined (mode needs alpha,beta>1).
Training rollouts stay stochastic — PPO needs exploration; deterministic-trained PPO is a different algorithm (out of scope).

locator.quote: under argmax: day_pnl −£7/d, bets 14/d. Under stochastic: day_pnl

text: Argmax vs stochastic diverge dramatically at deploy: 1df49aa0 under argmax day_pnl −£7/d, bets 14/d; under stochastic +£121/d, bets ~50/d.

locator.quote: trades 3× less and posts a sign-flip on net P&L.

text: The argmax (most-likely-action) policy trades 3× less and posts a sign-flip on net P&L — live action-mode choice matters more than held-out reeval suggests.
